TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Trayan, title = Trayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trayan} }

S.FORM: alang Trayan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 17 buwan, 72 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 30 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Trayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Trayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Trayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Trayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Trayan hya' ga Ulay. tay 'llaw na Trayan hya' ga Minse. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Trayan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 17 buwan, 72 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 30 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Trayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Trayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Trayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Trayan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Trayan hya' ga Ulay. tay 'llaw na Trayan hya' ga Minse. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ trajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, **/** . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na trajan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na trajan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na trajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na trajan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na trajan ħjaʔ ɣa ulaj. taj ʔllaw na trajan ħjaʔ ɣa mins~ɕe. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
